question: In LosslessCut, what steps are required to move the downloaded executable to the Program Files directory?
answer: Right-click the "LosslessCut-win.exe" file in Downloads and select "Copy", then open the C drive, navigate to "Program Files", create a new folder named "LosslessCut", and paste the file into this folder.
keypoints: The user right-clicks on the "LosslessCut-win.exe" file and selects "Copy" from the context menu.
The user opens the C drive and navigates to the "Program Files" directory.
The user creates a new folder named "LosslessCut" within the "Program Files" directory.
The user pastes the copied "LosslessCut-win.exe" file into the newly created "LosslessCut" folder.

question: In LosslessCut, how do you create a desktop shortcut when Windows prevents shortcut creation in Program Files?
answer: Right-click the "LosslessCut-win.exe" file in the "LosslessCut" folder, select "Create shortcut", then click "Yes" when prompted to place the shortcut on the desktop instead.
keypoints: The user right-clicks on the "LosslessCut-win.exe" file within the "LosslessCut" folder and selects "Create shortcut" from the context menu.
A dialog box appears stating "Windows can't create a shortcut here. Do you want the shortcut to be placed on the desktop instead?" The user clicks "Yes".
The shortcut for LosslessCut is created on the desktop.
